nasb.text: Abraham said to his servant, the oldest of his household, who had charge of all that he owned, “Please place your hand under my thigh,

esv.text: And Abraham said to his servant, the oldest of his household, who had charge of all that he had, “Put your hand under my thigh,

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕對他家中最老的，管理他所有產業的那僕人說：“請把你的手放在我的大腿底下。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕对他的老总管说：“请你把手放在我大腿底下，

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕对管理他所有家业、家中最大的仆人说：“请你把手放在我大腿底下，
